features: 【❤ Package Includes】--You will receive 10 pairs of sparkly hair clips of different styles, enough to match with children's different styles of clothing. The design of sequins and scallion powder makes the hairpin particularly attractive. Wearing it can make your girls the focus, even in dimly lit places.

【❤ High-quality Materials】--These cute hair clips are made of high-quality alloys and shiny accessories. The alloy material is smooth and will not hurt the girl's soft hair. The shiny hair accessories make the girl look more lively and cute.
【❤ Widely Applications】--Our hair clips are suitable for all occasions, such as birthday parties, weddings, dances, travel and daily life.
【❤ Perfect Gift】--This cute hair clip set is the perfect gift for Christmas, birthday and children's day.

【❤ Hassle-Free Service】--We stand firmly behind our products. Each product comes with worry-free 12 months and friendly customer service. For quality related issues, a replacement or refund is allowed.
